title: RedWolf's Music Expansion
description: 💿 Add Redwolf's discs to you game !
body:
This mod adds every disc created by RedWolf available on his Youtube channel or other platforms like Spotify.

**Structure Discs :**

Most discs can be found in Vanilla Structures, even tho they are quite rare. The mod include a Just Enough Item compatibility, which should provide an item description giving an idea of where to find each disc.
Some other, mostly some of the discs that were used by popular mods won't generate in loottables, and will see their recipe disappear in order to avoid as much as possible having 2 versions of a discs.

Lists of Discs and the structures they can be found in :
_(keep in mind that they are quite rare to find, so making engraved disc can be an alternative to complete your collection)_

![Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e5636e722db7341e10d72e431f8f8abd64e328.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Amethyzied & Rascal : Abandoned Mineshaft
- Forest & Birch Sunrise & Blossom : Plain Village
- The Lost Soul : Nether Fortress
- Shrooming : Woodland Mansion
- Flying Ships : End City
- Too Much Space & Endless Void : Stronghold
- Waves : Buried Treasures
- The Dark Side : Ancient City
- The Bright Side : Bastion
- Into the Jungle : Jungle Temple
- Night In Savanna : Savanna Village
- Out of Them : Wandering Traders (12 Emeralds)
</details>

**Disc Engraver :**

All the discs can also be obtained by making a Disc Engraver. It can be used to craft the new discs, with a Blank Disc and a specific item, all compatible with Just Enough Items. Blank Discs can be found rarely in Plain Villages and Mineshafts, but to get them, the easier way will be to find Dungeon spawner rooms. Each chest will now guarantee a Blank Disc, making Dungeon spawners an easy way to obtain 2 Blank Discs each time.

![Disc Engraver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfa7ed2abdf90f330b1b1e8acce41631d017df52.png)

The Disc Inscriber makes for an easier way to get a specific disc for your personal experience; but to not disturb the discs' rarity, an "Engraved" mention will be visible on records obtained that way, making Original ones more valuable while still having an easier way to enjoy some cool vibes.

It can also be used for decoration and will display a rotating blank disc when a Blank Disc is placed inside.

Recipes :
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Awakening : Gold Block
- Amethyzied : Amethyst Block
- Birthday : Cake
- Birch Sunrise : Birch Log
- Blossom : Chery Leaves
- Endless Void : Ender Eye
- Endstone Golem : Dragon Breath
- Flying Ships : Purpur Block
- Forest : Oak Log
- Into the Jungle : Jungle Leaves
- Night In Savannah : Acacia Sapling
- Out of Them : Bell
- Queen : Magenta Candle
- Rascal : Rail
- Shrooming : Mycelium or any Mushroom Block
- Sins : Bone
- The Bright Side : Shroomlight
- The Dark Side : Echo Shard
- The Lost Soul : Soul Sand or Soul Soil
- Too Much Space : Spyglass
- Waves : Grass Block or Sand

</details>

**Vinyl Sleeves :**
Vinyl Sleeves are an handy accessory, made out of paper, allowing you up to 9 slots of storage to transport Music Discs and Blank Discs.


The mod is compatible with JEI and data driven, meaning that you can use CraftTweaker or Datapacks to customize recipes for your modpacks.

- Music by Redwolf
- Art and Code Sweety
